content.query:
union (Tailscale_Devices_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId | summarize V=toreal(count())                              | extend Metric="Devices",            Order=1),(Tailscale_Users_CL   | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserId   | summarize V=toreal(count())                              | extend Metric="Users",              Order=2),(Tailscale_Keys_CL    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by KeyId    | summarize V=toreal(countif(isnull(Revoked)))              | extend Metric="Active keys",        Order=3),(Tailscale_Audit_CL   | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}                                                   | summarize V=toreal(count())                              | extend Metric="Audit events",       Order=4),(Tailscale_Audit_CL   | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where tostring(Target.property) == "ACL" or tostring(Target.property) == "DNS_SPLIT_DNS" or tostring(Target.property) == "DNS_NAMESERVERS" or tostring(Target.property) == "MAGICDNS_PREFERENCES" | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="DNS / ACL changes", Order=5)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value=V

content.title: Audit events by action

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName)
| where isnotempty(ActorLogin)
| summarize EventCount = count() by ActorLogin
| top 10 by EventCount
| render barchart
content.title: Top 10 actors

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize EventCount = count() by TargetType = tostring(Target.type)
| top 10 by EventCount
| render piechart
content.title: Activity by target type

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| summarize Count = count() by Os
| order by Count desc
content.title: Devices by OS

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| summarize Count = count() by ClientVersion
| order by Count desc
content.title: Devices by client version

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| mv-expand Tag = Tags to typeof(string)
| summarize Devices = dcount(DeviceId) by Tag = iff(isempty(Tag), "(untagged)", Tag)
| order by Devices desc
content.title: Devices by tag

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| extend DaysSinceSeen = datetime_diff('day', now(), LastSeen)
| extend DaysToExpiry = iff(KeyExpiryDisabled == true, int(null), datetime_diff('day', Expires, now()))
| project DeviceName, Hostname, User, Os, ClientVersion, UpdateAvailable, LastSeen, DaysSinceSeen, DaysToExpiry, KeyExpiryDisabled, Tags, AdvertisedRoutes
| order by LastSeen desc
content.title: All devices (latest snapshot per device)

content.json: Subnet routers and exit nodes

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| where array_length(AdvertisedRoutes) > 0 or array_length(EnabledRoutes) > 0
| project DeviceName, User, Os, AdvertisedRoutes, EnabledRoutes, Tags, LastSeen
| order by DeviceName asc
content.title: Devices advertising routes (subnet routers / exit nodes)

content.query:
Tailscale_Users_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserId
| summarize Users = count() by Role
| order by Users desc
content.title: Users by role

content.query:
Tailscale_Users_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserId
| summarize Users = count() by Status
| order by Users desc
content.title: Users by status

content.query:
Tailscale_Users_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserId
| extend DaysSinceSeen = datetime_diff('day', now(), LastSeen)
| project LoginName, DisplayName, Role, Status, UserType, DeviceCount, CurrentlyConnected, LastSeen, DaysSinceSeen, Created
| order by LastSeen desc
content.title: All users (latest snapshot per user)

content.query:
Tailscale_Keys_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by KeyId
| where isnull(Revoked)
| summarize Count = count() by KeyType
content.title: Credentials by type

content.query:
Tailscale_Keys_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by KeyId
| where isnull(Revoked) and isnotnull(Expires)
| extend DaysToExpiry = datetime_diff('day', Expires, now())
| extend Bucket = case(DaysToExpiry < 0, '0 expired', DaysToExpiry < 7, '1 within 7d', DaysToExpiry < 30, '2 within 30d', DaysToExpiry < 90, '3 within 90d', '4 over 90d')
| summarize Keys = count() by Bucket
| order by Bucket asc
content.title: Credentials by expiry window

content.query:
Tailscale_Keys_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by KeyId
| extend DaysToExpiry = iff(isnull(Expires), int(null), datetime_diff('day', Expires, now()))
| project KeyId, KeyType, Description, Created, Expires, DaysToExpiry, Revoked, Capabilities
| order by Created desc
content.title: All credentials (latest snapshot per ID)

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where tostring(Target.type) in ("AUTH_KEY", "API_KEY", "OAUTH_CLIENT")
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName)
| project TimeGenerated, ActorLogin, Action, TargetType = tostring(Target.type), TargetId = tostring(Target.id), Description = tostring(New.description)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Create / update / delete events on credentials

content.query:
Tailscale_Dns_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ConfigType
| project ConfigType, Nameservers, MagicDNS, SearchPaths, LastUpdated = TimeGenerated
| order by ConfigType asc
content.title: DNS configuration snapshot (latest per config type)

content.query:
Tailscale_Settings_CL
| top 1 by TimeGenerated
| project
    ['Snapshot at'] = TimeGenerated,
    ['Device approval required'] = iff(DevicesApprovalOn == true, 'On', 'Off'),
    ['Device auto-updates'] = iff(DevicesAutoUpdatesOn == true, 'On', 'Off'),
    ['Device key duration (days)'] = DevicesKeyDurationDays,
    ['User approval required'] = iff(UsersApprovalOn == true, 'On', 'Off'),
    ['Users allowed to join external tailnets'] = UsersRoleAllowedToJoinExternalTailnets,
    ['Regional routing'] = iff(RegionalRoutingOn == true, 'On', 'Off'),
    ['Network flow logging'] = iff(NetworkFlowLoggingOn == true, 'On', 'Off'),
    ['Posture identity collection'] = iff(PostureIdentityCollectionOn == true, 'On', 'Off')
content.title: Current tailnet settings

content.json: DNS / ACL / Settings change history

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Action == "UPDATE" and tostring(Target.type) == "TAILNET"
| extend Property = tostring(Target.property), ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName)
| where Property in ("ACL", "DNS_NAMESERVERS", "DNS_SPLIT_DNS", "DNS_SEARCHPATHS", "MAGICDNS_PREFERENCES", "SETTINGS", "TAILNET_SETTINGS")
| project TimeGenerated, ActorLogin, Property, Old, New, Origin
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Tailnet configuration changes

content.query:
Tailscale_Webhooks_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EndpointId
| project EndpointId, EndpointUrl, ProviderType, CreatorLoginName, Created, LastModified, Subscriptions
content.title: All webhooks (latest snapshot per endpoint)

content.json: Webhook change history (from audit log)

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where tostring(Target.type) == "WEBHOOK" or tostring(Target.property) =~ "WEBHOOK"
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName)
| project TimeGenerated, ActorLogin, Action, Target, Old, New, Origin
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Webhook create / update / delete events

content.query:
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| mv-expand t = VirtualTraffic
| extend Src = tostring(t.src), Dst = tostring(t.dst), Bytes = tolong(t.txBytes) + tolong(t.rxBytes)
| summarize TotalBytes = sum(Bytes) by Src, Dst
| top 25 by TotalBytes
content.title: Top 25 src->dst pairs by bytes

content.query:
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where array_length(ExitTraffic) > 0
| mv-expand t = ExitTraffic
| extend Bytes = tolong(t.txBytes) + tolong(t.rxBytes)
| summarize TotalBytes = sum(Bytes), Flows = count() by SrcNodeName = tostring(SrcNode.name), ExitDst = tostring(t.dst)
| top 25 by TotalBytes
content.title: Exit-node egress

content.query:
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where array_length(SubnetTraffic) > 0
| mv-expand t = SubnetTraffic
| extend Bytes = tolong(t.txBytes) + tolong(t.rxBytes)
| summarize TotalBytes = sum(Bytes), Flows = count() by SrcNodeName = tostring(SrcNode.name)
| top 15 by TotalBytes
content.title: Subnet routers by throughput

content.query:
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| mv-expand t = VirtualTraffic
| extend Bytes = tolong(t.txBytes) + tolong(t.rxBytes)
| summarize TotalBytes = sum(Bytes) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Virtual traffic bytes per hour

content.query:
Tailscale_PostureIntegrations_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IntegrationId
| project Provider, IntegrationId, ClientId, TenantId_Provider, Status, ConfigOverwrites
| order by Provider asc
content.title: Current posture integrations

content.query:
Tailscale_PostureIntegrations_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IntegrationId
| summarize Count = count() by Provider
| order by Count desc
content.title: By provider

content.query:
Tailscale_Settings_CL
| top 1 by TimeGenerated
| project PostureIdentityCollectionOn
content.title: Posture identity collection

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Action in ("CREATE", "UPDATE", "DELETE")
| where tostring(Target.type) startswith "POSTURE" or tostring(Target.type) == "POSTURE_INTEGRATION"
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName)
| project TimeGenerated, ActorLogin, Action, Provider = tostring(Target.name), Old, New
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Audit log: posture-integration changes
Audit events per hour

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName), TargetType = tostring(Target.type)
| summarize EventCount = count() by ActorLogin, Action, TargetType
| order by EventCount desc
content.title: Actor / Action / Target heatmap

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName), TargetType = tostring(Target.type), Property = tostring(Target.property)
| project TimeGenerated, ActorLogin, Action, TargetType, Property, TargetId = tostring(Target.id), Origin
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent 100 audit events

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AlertName startswith "Tailscale"
| summarize Count = count() by AlertName, AlertSeverity
| order by Count desc
content.title: Alerts by rule

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AlertName startswith "Tailscale"
| summarize Count = count() by AlertSeverity
| render piechart
content.title: Severity distribution

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AlertName startswith "Tailscale"
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, AlertSeverity, Description, Entities
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Recent Tailscale alerts

content.json:
---

**Tailscale Premium (CCF)** | All Standard telemetry plus network flow logs (`/logging/network`) and posture integrations (`/posture/integrations`) on Premium / Enterprise tier tailnets.
